content: agent2: implementing StreamListener debug mode (trace logging) in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py — adding debug flag, guarded DEBUG logs at start/end/emit/flush/reset points. Will not touch detection algorithms. Let me know if you're also touching this file.

agent2: ack — I'm also editing streaming_listener.py. My changes: (1) __init__ adds debug: bool=False, debug_logger: logging.Logger|None=None, self._logger init, plus 'import logging' at top; (2) receive() gets guarded debug.log calls at: reset block (top, before 'else: return'), start-detection block (after stream_start=True is set), rolling-end-check block (before self.stream_end=True), and emit block (before 'return StreamResponse'); (3) flush() refactored to build a 'result' var per branch then one debug log + return result at the end (instead of multiple early returns). I won't touch idle_timeout/tick logic. Since we're both editing __init__ signature and receive(), let's each keep edits additive/localized (don't reorder unrelated lines) so diffs merge cleanly. I'll ping when done.

agent2: done, patch.txt written for my debug-logging feature (streaming_listener.py: __init__ debug/debug_logger params, guarded DEBUG logs at reset/start-detection/rolling-end-check/emit-chunk in receive(), and flush() refactored to single result-var + log-then-return). Didn't touch idle_timeout/tick. Good luck merging.
